summary: Iteration 129: Runtime data depth & policy auto-fix testing completed. Backend 10/12 tests passed (2 transient 503 errors). Frontend runtime regression passed - Home, Search, Listing detail pages working without JS errors.

minor.issue: Intermittent 503 DB_ERROR during draft creation (transient DB connection issue)

issues: Seller card displays basic info but rating/reviews_count/response_rate from API not shown in UI. Consider using SellerCardBlock from ExtendedRuntimeBlocks.jsx which has these metrics

action_items: Optional: Add seller reputation metrics (rating/reviews_count/response_rate) to DetailPage.js seller card - data is available in API but not rendered in current UI
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed pages for policy testing via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 129 tested: (1) Backend seller reputation fields (rating/reviews_count/response_rate) return correctly from /api/v1/listings/vehicle/{id}, (2) Similar listings scoring (score/score_explanation/score_breakdown) working, (3) Nearby POIs endpoint working with osm/fallback, (4) Policy report fix_suggestion + suggested_fixes working, (5) Policy auto-fix endpoint returns 200 with report_after. Admin Content Builder data-testids verified in code: preset-persona-select, preset-variant-select, policy-autofix-button, preset-analytics-panel. Session management issues prevented live UI testing of admin features but code inspection confirms implementation.

backend_similar_scoring.score_explanation: PASS - Returns list of explanation strings

backend_policy_fix_suggestion.checks_fix_suggestion: PASS - Each check[] has fix_suggestion field

backend_policy_autofix.auto_fix_actions: PASS - Returns list of applied fixes

frontend_runtime_regression.home_page: PASS - Loads without JS errors, shows sliders/categories/modules
frontend_runtime_regression.search_page: PASS - Loads with listings, filter sidebar, sort dropdown
frontend_runtime_regression.listing_detail: PASS - Shows title, price, seller info, similar listings
